choose-codex-cockpit.title: Choose Codex Cockpit
choose-codex-cockpit.subtitle: Ask for project and GitHub target, then open role workspaces

open-penny-cockpit.title: Open Penny Cockpit
open-penny-cockpit.subtitle: Launch Penny in cmux and Codex app

commands.name: Codex Cockpit Picker
commands.description: Ask which project to work on, confirm the GitHub target, launch the role workspaces, then close this temporary picker.

surfaces.name: choose
surfaces.command: repo="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; cd "$repo" && bin/cmux-codex-launcher --choose; status=$?; if [ "$status" -eq 0 ]; then cmux close-workspace --workspace "$CMUX_WORKSPACE_ID"; else printf '\nLauncher failed (exit %s). Fix it here, then rerun bin/cmux-codex-launcher --choose.\n' "$status"; exec "${SHELL:-/bin/zsh}" -l; fi

commands.name: Penny Cockpit Launcher
commands.description: Launch the saved Penny profile, then close this temporary launcher workspace.

surfaces.name: open-penny
surfaces.command: repo="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; cd "$repo" && bin/cmux-codex-launcher --profile penny; status=$?; if [ "$status" -eq 0 ]; then cmux close-workspace --workspace "$CMUX_WORKSPACE_ID"; else printf '\nLauncher failed (exit %s). Fix it here, then rerun bin/cmux-codex-launcher --profile penny.\n' "$status"; exec "${SHELL:-/bin/zsh}" -l; fi

commands.name: Launcher Picker Dry Run
commands.description: Resolve a file/app/repo search into a launch plan without opening cmux or Codex app.

commands.name: Launcher Dry Run
commands.description: Print the Penny launcher plan without opening cmux or Codex app.

commands.name: Launcher Tests
commands.description: Run shell checks for the launcher.
